lines.english: Lesson 137
lines.chinese: 第137课
lines.raw: Lesson 137 | 第137课

lines.english: A pleasant dream
lines.chinese: 美梦
lines.raw: A pleasant dream | 美梦

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.chinese: 听录音，然后回答这个问题。
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答这个问题。

lines.english: What would Julie like to do, if she had the money?
lines.chinese: 如果有钱，朱莉想做什么？
lines.raw: What would Julie like to do, if she had the money? | 如果有钱，朱莉想做什么？

lines.english: Are you doing the football pools, Brain?
lines.chinese: 布莱恩，你在填写足球彩票吗？
lines.raw: Are you doing the football pools, Brain? | 布莱恩，你在填写足球彩票吗？

lines.english: Yes, I've nearly finished, Julie.
lines.chinese: 是的，我快填完了，朱莉。
lines.raw: Yes, I've nearly finished, Julie. | 是的，我快填完了，朱莉。

lines.english: I'm sure we'll win something this week.
lines.chinese: 我相信这星期我们一定会中奖。
lines.raw: I'm sure we'll win something this week. | 我相信这星期我们一定会中奖。

lines.english: You always say that, but we never win anything!
lines.chinese: 你总是那么说，可我们从来没中过奖！
lines.raw: You always say that, but we never win anything! | 你总是那么说，可我们从来没中过奖！

lines.english: What will you do if you win a lot of money?
lines.chinese: 如果你赢了许多钱，你准备做什么？
lines.raw: What will you do if you win a lot of money? | 如果你赢了许多钱，你准备做什么？

lines.english: If I win a lot of money I'll buy you a mink coat.
lines.chinese: 如果我赢了许多钱，我给你买件貂皮大衣。
lines.raw: If I win a lot of money I'll buy you a mink coat. | 如果我赢了许多钱，我给你买件貂皮大衣。

lines.english: I don't want a mink coat!
lines.chinese: 我不想要貂皮大衣！
lines.raw: I don't want a mink coat! | 我不想要貂皮大衣！

lines.english: I want to see the world.
lines.chinese: 我想去周游世界。
lines.raw: I want to see the world. | 我想去周游世界。

lines.english: All right.
lines.chinese: 好吧。
lines.raw: All right. | 好吧。

lines.english: If we win a lot of money we'll travel round the world and we'll stay at the best hotels.
lines.chinese: 如果我们赢了许多钱，我们就周游世界，住最好的宾馆。
lines.raw: If we win a lot of money we'll travel round the world and we'll stay at the best hotels. | 如果我们赢了许多钱，我们就周游世界，住最好的宾馆。

lines.english: Then we'll return home and buy a big house in the country.
lines.chinese: 然后我们回家，在乡下买幢大房子。
lines.raw: Then we'll return home and buy a big house in the country. | 然后我们回家，在乡下买幢大房子。

lines.english: We'll have a beautiful garden and...
lines.chinese: 我们要有一个漂亮的花园，还有……
lines.raw: We'll have a beautiful garden and... | 我们要有一个漂亮的花园，还有……

lines.english: But if we spend all that money we'll be poor again.
lines.chinese: 可是，如果我们把钱都花光了，我们不又会变穷吗？
lines.raw: But if we spend all that money we'll be poor again. | 可是，如果我们把钱都花光了，我们不又会变穷吗？

lines.english: What'll we do then?
lines.chinese: 那时我们怎么办呢？
lines.raw: What'll we do then? | 那时我们怎么办呢？

lines.english: If we spend all the money we'll try and win the football pools again.
lines.chinese: 如果我们把钱都花光了，我们再争取赢一次足球彩票。
lines.raw: If we spend all the money we'll try and win the football pools again. | 如果我们把钱都花光了，我们再争取赢一次足球彩票。

lines.english: It's a pleasant dream but everything depends on 'if' !
lines.chinese: 这是个美梦，但一切都取决于“如果”！
lines.raw: It's a pleasant dream but everything depends on 'if' ! | 这是个美梦，但一切都取决于“如果”！
